title: koeleria arduana
intro: Koeleria arduana, also known as hard-grass or rough-grass, is a species of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Koeleria arduana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, Koeleria arduana is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
